feature_name: Adaptive onboarding scaffold beta build update
scope_summary: Updates the hub beta app build to include adaptive onboarding intake (goal, overwhelm, anchor task), onboarding-to-kickoff flow, planner scaffolding, and clearer next-step navigation for users.

legal_and_regulatory.rationale: No new regulatory data category is introduced and existing disclosures remain visible in-app.
evidence: Legal routes remain available under /legal/privacy and /legal/terms.
No monetization or payment handling was introduced in this release.

privacy_local_first_promise.rationale: The flow changes are client-side and maintain local-first storage behavior without silent data exfiltration.
evidence: Onboarding profile state is persisted through the existing local storage app data model.
No new external API calls were added in hub beta route updates.

medical_scope_and_claims.rationale: The update keeps productivity framing and does not add diagnostic or treatment claims.
evidence: Current UI retains non-medical disclaimer language.
Kickoff flow wording focuses on task execution and planning support.

behavioral_science_alignment.rationale: The flow reduces choice overload through explicit next-step sequencing and anchor-task guidance.
evidence: Onboarding intake captures the user's why, primary goal, and anchor task before entering the planner.
Kickoff checklist enforces a small ordered setup path.
Today view surfaces a single next-step recommendation.

neurodivergence_research_alignment.rationale: Overwhelm-based pacing is preserved so task load scales with user-reported capacity.
evidence: Onboarding captures self-reported stimulation/overwhelm to tune first-step planning.
Daily task cap logic remains coupled to check-in overwhelm value.
Anchor-task prioritization avoids multi-task overload by default.

user_benefit_and_harm_check.rationale: Users gain a clearer path from onboarding to action while preserving existing controls and exits.
evidence: Kickoff completion allows immediate entry to normal app routing.
Users can still skip kickoff and continue to core planner pages.

brand_voice_and_claims.rationale: Language remains direct and supportive with no manipulative urgency or exaggerated outcomes.
evidence: Guide and kickoff content use plain-language operational instructions.
No promise of medical or guaranteed performance outcomes was added.

accessibility_and_inclusion.rationale: New screens use existing accessible controls, semantic lists, and keyboard-friendly interactions.
evidence: Checklist and feature cards reuse button/link components with clear labels.
Existing reduced-motion and low-stim toggles continue to function.

security_and_reliability.rationale: Build artifacts were regenerated from typed source and validated with test/build pipeline checks.
evidence: TypeScript build completed without errors before publishing hub beta assets.
Vitest suite passed for session state behavior.

monetization_and_dark_pattern_check.rationale: No monetization UI or coercive prompts were added in this flow update.
evidence: Kickoff flow only guides setup actions for planning and focus.
No paywalls, upsells, or hidden conversion mechanics were introduced.

ship_decision.conditions: Release on branch for testing and monitor onboarding completion and task-start behavior.
